rationale: Round-2 fix verified against my durable-obligation/matched-set lens. (1) Seam identity: complete.Run computes gateRoots ONCE (complete.go:384) and feeds it to BOTH panelGate and reconcilePendingRefutations (complete.go:568); both derive their matched set from the byte-identical panel.ForBead(panelScanFn(roots...), beadID) (panel_advisory.go:172, :664) — gate and reconcile cannot diverge on the matched set, and both re-scan fresh fs state, so any intervening change is caught, not stale. (2) G1's cross-panel false discharge is genuinely closed: dischargeVerified now requires the two-disjunct dischargeEvidence to hold in EVERY re-tallied matched panel; a live origin-panel RC vetoes → Refuse. Mutation A (revert to regs[:1]) turned TestPanelRefuted_CrossPanel_NoFalseDischarge RED, proving the pin. (3) Reconcile stays at complete.go:568, after the ADR gate and immediately before closeBeadFn (:573), self-scanning so panel-present/no-panel/hatch all covered — ordering guard intact. (4) Strictness is sound: applied-this-run Satisfies BEFORE the discharge check, single-panel slot-resolution still discharges, and the only cost is a recoverable Refuse that never drops an obligation. Fixes #2/#3 load-bearing (mutations B/C → RED). Build/gofmt/vet clean; panel+complete+bead+cmd suites and -race all green; scope = 3 files in internal/complete. No residual false-discharge or lost-audit path.

findings.detail: gateRoots shared through the identical panel.ForBead(panelScanFn(roots...), beadID) construction at panel_advisory.go:172 (gate) and :664 (reconcile); panelGate's 3-tuple + 13 call sites unchanged (re-scan chosen over arity change), confirmed.

dischargeVerified vetoes discharge unless dischargeEvidence holds in every matched panel; retallyOK also fails on zero matched panels or any tally error → fail-closed Refuse. Mutation A (first-panel-only) → CrossPanel test RED.

reconcile at complete.go:568 precedes close at :573 on every path. applied-this-run Satisfy precedes dischargeVerified, so a legitimate single- or multi-panel completion is never wrongly blocked; over-conservatism cost is a recoverable Refuse only, never a lost audit. covered-of-record no-op recognizes only prior durably-gated audits, (slot,round)-exact (control subtest).
